title: Hutt battle armor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Hutt_Armor.jpg|thumb|250px|A [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] clad in Hutt battle armor.]]

'''Hutt battle armor''' was ancient [[Armor/Legends|armor]] worn by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] of old. It increased their strength, dexterity, speed, and provided optimal protection. Tiny [[Repulsorlift/Legends|microrepulsors]] in the armor made it lighter and more maneuverable. It was equipped with a [[droid translator unit]], a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]], two wrist-mounted [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], and an [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web heavy repeating blaster]] mounted on the shoulder.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tempest Feud]]''
